faculty_name: Faculty of Applied Science and Technology – Undergraduate

courses.course_name: Bachelor of Science in Applied Statistics and Computing

cutt_off: WASSCE Aggregate 24 or SSSCE Aggregate 24 or better
mode: Full-time on-campus lectures and computer lab practicals
Regular session
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Credit passes (A1-C6) in English, Mathematics, and Integrated Science plus three relevant elective subjects including Elective Mathematics
Aggregate of 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better
Strong mathematical background required
level_note: Produces graduates skilled in statistical analysis and computing applications.
High-demand programme for data-driven industries.

courses.course_name: Bachelor of Science in Computerized Accounting

cutt_off: WASSCE Aggregate 24 or SSSCE Aggregate 24 or better
mode: Full-time on-campus lectures and computer lab sessions
Regular and weekend options available
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Credit passes (A1-C6) in three core subjects (English, Mathematics, Integrated Science/Social Studies) and three relevant elective subjects
Aggregate of 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better
Mature applicants: 25 years or older with relevant work experience and must pass entrance exam
level_note: Combines accounting principles with modern computing technology.
Accredited by the Ghana Tertiary Education Commission (GTEC).

courses.course_name: Bachelor of Technology in Data Communication and Networking

cutt_off: WASSCE Aggregate 24 or SSSCE Aggregate 24 or better
mode: Full-time on-campus with networking laboratory practicals
Regular session
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Credit passes (A1-C6) in English, Mathematics, and Integrated Science plus three relevant elective subjects
Aggregate of 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better
Science or Technical background preferred
level_note: Addresses the growing demand for networking professionals in Ghana.
Practical training with modern networking equipment and simulators.

courses.course_name: Bachelor of Technology in Ecological Agriculture

cutt_off: WASSCE Aggregate 24 or better
mode: Full-time on-campus with farm-based practicals
Regular session with field attachments
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Credit passes in English, Core Mathematics, and Integrated Science plus three relevant Agriculture or Science elective subjects
Aggregate of 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better
Agriculture or Science background required
level_note: Ecological Agriculture is the niche area of Bolgatanga Technical University.
Students benefit from BTU's Sumbrungu campus agricultural research farms.

courses.course_name: Bachelor of Science in Food Processing Technology

cutt_off: WASSCE Aggregate 24 or better (Science background required)
mode: Full-time on-campus with processing laboratory practicals
Industrial attachment in food processing plants
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Credit passes in English, Core Mathematics, and Integrated Science plus three Science or Agriculture elective subjects
Aggregate of 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better
Science or Agriculture background required
level_note: Addresses Ghana's need for skilled food processing professionals.
Hands-on training in food processing, quality control and safety.

courses.course_name: Bachelor of Science in Medical Laboratory Technology

cutt_off: WASSCE Aggregate 24 or better (Science background required)
mode: Full-time on-campus with intensive laboratory practicals
Clinical attachment at hospitals
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Credit passes in English, Core Mathematics, and Integrated Science plus three Science electives (Biology, Chemistry, Physics/Elective Maths)
Aggregate of 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better
Science/Technical school background required
level_note: Produces highly skilled medical laboratory professionals for Ghana's health sector.
Includes clinical rotations and hands-on laboratory training.

courses.course_name: Bachelor of Science in Tourism Management

cutt_off: WASSCE Aggregate 24 or SSSCE Aggregate 24 or better
mode: Full-time on-campus with field trips to tourism sites
Regular and weekend options
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Credit passes in English, Mathematics, and Integrated Science/Social Studies plus three relevant elective subjects
Aggregate of 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better
Mature applicants: 25 years or older with relevant experience
level_note: Leverages the rich cultural and tourism potential of the Upper East Region.
Includes industrial attachment and practical tourism field studies.

faculty_name: Faculty of Applied Science and Technology – Diploma/HND

courses.course_name: Diploma in Applied Statistics and Computing

cutt_off: WASSCE/SSSCE: Four passes including English and Mathematics
mode: Full-time on-campus with computer lab practicals
Regular and evening sessions available
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Four passes (A1-D7) including English Language and Core Mathematics plus two relevant elective subjects
GBCE/RSA II holders with passes in English and Mathematics
Mature applicants: 25 years or older, must pass entrance examination
level_note: Foundational programme in statistics and computing.
Pathway to HND Statistics or BSc Applied Statistics and Computing.

cutt_off: WASSCE/SSSCE: Four passes including English and Mathematics
mode: Full-time on-campus with computer lab practicals
Regular and evening sessions

GBCE/RSA II holders with passes in English and Mathematics
Mature applicants: 25 years or older, must pass entrance examination
level_note: Foundation programme in computer science principles and practice.
Pathway to HND or BTech in ICT-related programmes.

cutt_off: WASSCE/SSSCE: Four passes including English and Mathematics
mode: Full-time on-campus with computer lab practicals
Regular and evening sessions
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Four passes (A1-D7) including English Language and Core Mathematics plus two relevant elective subjects
GBCE/RSA II holders with passes in English and Mathematics
Mature applicants: 25 years or older, must pass entrance examination
level_note: Emerging programme preparing students for the data economy.
Practical skills in data collection, analysis, and visualization.

cutt_off: WASSCE/SSSCE: Four passes including English and Mathematics
mode: Full-time on-campus with computer lab practicals
Regular and evening sessions
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Four passes (A1-D7) including English Language and Core Mathematics plus two relevant elective subjects
GBCE/RSA II holders with passes in English and Mathematics
Mature applicants: 25 years or older, must pass entrance examination
level_note: Foundation programme in information technology skills.

cutt_off: WASSCE/SSSCE: Four passes including English and Mathematics
mode: Full-time on-campus with networking lab practicals
Regular and evening sessions
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Four passes (A1-D7) including English Language and Core Mathematics plus two relevant elective subjects
GBCE/RSA II holders with passes in English and Mathematics
Mature applicants: 25 years or older, must pass entrance examination
level_note: Practical networking skills with hands-on lab equipment.
Pathway to BTech in Data Communication and Networking.

cutt_off: WASSCE Aggregate 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better
mode: Full-time on-campus with computer lab practicals
Regular session (3-year programme)
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Six passes (A1-D7) in three core subjects (English, Mathematics, Integrated Science/Social Studies) and three relevant elective subjects with credit passes (A1-C6)
GBCE/ABCE applicants: Five GCE O Level credits plus three A Level passes
Mature applicants: 25 years or older with four WASSCE passes including English and Mathematics
level_note: Three-year Higher National Diploma producing statistical technicians.
Pathway to BSc Applied Statistics and Computing top-up programme.

cutt_off: WASSCE Aggregate 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better (Science background)
mode: Full-time on-campus with intensive laboratory practicals
Clinical attachment at hospitals
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Six passes in three core subjects (English, Mathematics, Integrated Science) and three Science electives (Biology, Chemistry, Physics) with credit passes
Science or Technical school background required
Mature applicants: 25 years or older with relevant Science passes
level_note: Produces medical laboratory technicians for Ghana's health sector.
Pathway to BSc Medical Laboratory Technology top-up programme.

courses.course_name: MSc. Agricultural Farm Power and Machinery Engineering

mode: Full-time on-campus with workshop and field practicals
Research thesis component required
entry_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Agricultural Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, or related field (minimum Second Class Lower)
Must pass a selection interview
Submit a research proposal of maximum 1,500 words
level_note: Equips students with advanced knowledge in farm power systems and machinery.
Strong emphasis on applied research for mechanized agriculture in Ghana.

mode: Full-time with field-based and laboratory research
Research thesis required
entry_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Agricultural Engineering, Civil Engineering, or related field (minimum Second Class Lower)
Must pass a selection interview
Submit a research proposal of maximum 1,500 words
level_note: Addresses the critical need for irrigation expertise in Ghana's Upper East Region.
Combines classroom instruction with field-based water management research.

mode: Full-time with laboratory and field-based research
Research thesis component required
entry_requirements: Bachelor's degree in Agricultural Engineering, Food Science, or related field (minimum Second Class Lower)
Must pass a selection interview
Submit a research proposal of maximum 1,500 words
level_note: Focuses on reducing postharvest losses critical to food security in Ghana.
Hands-on research using BTU's postharvest laboratory facilities.

courses.course_name: Bachelor of Technology in Agricultural Engineering

cutt_off: WASSCE Aggregate 24 or better (Science/Technical background required)
mode: Full-time on-campus with workshop and field practicals
Regular session with industrial attachment
entry_requirements: WASSCE/SSSCE: Credit passes (A1-C6) in English, Core Mathematics, Integrated Science plus three relevant Science/Technical elective subjects
Aggregate of 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better
Science or Technical school background required
level_note: Blends agricultural science with engineering principles.
Strong focus on irrigation and mechanization for northern Ghana.

courses.course_name: Bachelor of Science in Automobile Engineering

mode: Full-time on-campus with automotive workshop practicals

Aggregate of 24 (SSSCE) or 36 (WASSCE) or better
Technical/Vocational school background preferred
